/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_dirac_vacuum_chiral_coupling.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_dirac_vacuum_chiral_coupling.dir/test/test_dirac_vacuum_chiral_coupling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dirac_vacuum_chiral_coupling.dir/src/ConservativeSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dirac_vacuum_chiral_coupling.dir/src/TRDCore3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dirac_vacuum_chiral_coupling.dir/src/Dirac3D.cpp.o -o bin/test_dirac_vacuum_chiral_coupling  /lib/libvulkan.so -lfftw3f -lpthread -lm
